intro.headline: Tailored to Your Body and Lifestyle
intro.subheadline: A simple, personalized plan to reduce cravings, detox your body and lose weight

intro.consent_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our

intro.footer_disclaimer: Zero Carbs Challenge's website, app, services, and products are meant to support general health. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. It should not be substituted for medical advice or medical intervention. Please consult a qualified healthcare provider when making medical decisions.

stepPage.bmi_checking: Calculating your BMI. This helps us create the right plan for your body.
stepPage.bmi_underweight: Your BMI is __BMI__, which is below the usual range
stepPage.bmi_underweight_body: You may benefit from gentle strength work and balanced nutrition.
stepPage.bmi_normal: Your BMI is __BMI__, which is in a healthy range
stepPage.bmi_normal_body: You are on the right track. Keep going with your routine.
stepPage.bmi_overweight: Your BMI is __BMI__, which is considered overweight
stepPage.bmi_overweight_body: Your weight needs more attention. We will use your score to tailor a plan to your needs and goals.
stepPage.bmi_obese: Your BMI is __BMI__, which is considered obesity
stepPage.bmi_obese_body: Your weight may affect your health. We will use your score to build a plan that fits your needs.
stepPage.goal_placeholder: Enter your goal weight to see your personalized guidance
stepPage.goal_weight_too_high: Your goal weight must be lower than your current weight.
stepPage.goal_too_low: Your goal may be too low for your body. A healthy BMI usually falls between 18.5 and 24.9.
stepPage.goal_a_lot: That is a big goal, and that is okay. We will help you reach it step by step.
stepPage.goal_moderate: This is a realistic goal. Steady progress can improve your health.
stepPage.goal_small: You are already close to your goal. Small changes can still make a real difference.
stepPage.consent_text: I allow my health data to be used to create a personalized plan.
stepPage.age_insight_20s_men_body: Reaching and keeping a healthy weight can help you build strength and create a strong base for the future.
stepPage.age_insight_20s_women_body: Working toward a healthy weight can help you feel healthier, stronger, and more confident in your body.
stepPage.age_insight_30s_men_body: Keeping a healthy weight can support your strength and energy as work and life become more demanding.
stepPage.age_insight_30s_women_body: Working toward a healthy weight can help you build healthier habits and feel stronger in your body.
stepPage.age_insight_40s_men_body: Staying at a healthy weight can help you keep your muscle, energy, and overall health.
stepPage.age_insight_40s_women_headline: Feel Strong and Full of Energy
stepPage.age_insight_40s_women_body: Working toward a healthy weight can help you feel more active, support your health, and improve your energy.
stepPage.age_insight_50s_men_body: Reaching and keeping a healthy weight can help you protect your health, strength, and energy for the years ahead.
stepPage.age_insight_50s_women_body: Understanding your body and working toward a healthy weight can help support your health and energy over time.
stepPage.age_insight_60s_men_body: Keeping a healthy weight can help you stay strong, active, and more independent.
stepPage.age_insight_60s_women_body: Working toward a healthy weight can help you support your health, strength, and well-being as you get older.
stepPage.age_insight_70s_men_body: Staying at a healthy weight can help support your health, strength, and independence for longer.
stepPage.age_insight_70s_women_body: Working toward a healthy weight can help support your health, strength, and independence over time.
stepPage.bmi_desc_underweight: Your BMI is below the healthy range. Building strength and healthy eating habits will be your priority.
stepPage.bmi_desc_normal: Good starting BMI to tone up and get your dream body.
stepPage.bmi_desc_risks: High blood pressure, increased risk of heart attack, stroke, type 2 diabetes, chronic back and joint pain.

loading.reviews.0.name: Elena, 41
loading.reviews.0.text: I really enjoyed this plan. By following it, I was able to lose weight in 28 days. The meals were simple, tasty, and easy to make.
loading.reviews.1.name: Marina, 33
loading.reviews.1.text: The meals were easy to follow. It made the whole challenge feel much easier for me.
loading.reviews.2.name: Daniel, 56
loading.reviews.2.text: It fit into my busy life. This challenge was easy to follow, even on busy days.
loading.reviews.3.name: Sarah, 38
loading.reviews.3.text: It gave me a good start. This challenge helped me get back on track and take care of myself again.
wellness.headline: Here is your personal profile
wellness.warning_desc: Zero Carbs Challenge is a dietary support tool. Please consult a professional if you have existing health conditions.
wellness.bmi_normal_msg: Your BMI is in a healthy range. This is a great place to start if you want to get more toned and improve your shape.
wellness.bmi_overweight_msg: Your BMI is above the healthy range. This can raise the risk of high blood pressure and other conditions.
wellness.bmi_obese_msg: Your BMI is in a high range. This can increase the risk of high blood pressure, heart problems, and type 2 diabetes.

paywall.features.0.title: A personalized Zero Carbs challenge
paywall.features.0.desc: Your plan is based on your goals, food preferences, routine, and lifestyle, so it feels more personal from the start.
paywall.features.1.title: AI coaching and support
paywall.features.1.desc: You get guidance that helps you handle cravings, busy days, low motivation, and the moments when you usually go off track.
paywall.features.2.title: Simple meal ideas and easy recipes
paywall.features.2.desc: You get clear ideas for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks, with meals that are easy to make and easier to follow.
paywall.features.3.title: A plan made for real life
paywall.features.3.desc: This is built to feel practical, flexible, and easier to stick with, not strict, confusing, or overwhelming.
paywall.bmi.Normal.title: Good starting point
paywall.bmi.Normal.text: Your BMI is __BMI__, which is in a normal range. You are on the right track. Your plan will be adjusted to fit your needs and help you keep your progress.
paywall.bmi.Underweight.title: Good starting point
paywall.bmi.Underweight.text: Your BMI is __BMI__, which is below the usual range. Your plan will focus on building strength and balanced nutrition.
paywall.bmi.Overweight.title: A good point to make a change
paywall.bmi.Overweight.text: Your BMI is __BMI__. With the right routine, you can improve how your body feels. We will guide you step by step with a plan that fits your daily life.
paywall.bmi.Obese.title: A good time to take care of your body
paywall.bmi.Obese.text: Your BMI is __BMI__. With the right plan, you can improve how your body feels and moves. We will guide you with small, simple steps that fit your daily life.
paywall.stories.0.name: Elena, 41
paywall.stories.0.text: I used to feel heavy, bloated, and upset with myself all the time. I would do well for a few days, then go back to eating sweets and snacks at night. The Personalized Zero Carbs Challenge helped me keep things simple. I did not have to overthink every meal, and that made it much easier to stay on track. After a few weeks, I felt lighter, more in control, and much better in my clothes. The best part was feeling proud of myself again.
paywall.stories.1.name: Marina, 33
paywall.stories.1.text: Before this, I always felt like I was starting over. I knew what to eat, but I could never stay consistent for long. What I liked most was that the plan felt personal and easy to follow. It gave me structure, but it did not feel too strict or confusing. I started seeing changes early, and that gave me real motivation. Now I feel calmer around food and much more confident in myself.
paywall.stories.2.name: Daniel, 56
paywall.stories.2.text: I had low energy and felt uncomfortable in my body. I wanted something simple that I could actually follow in real life. The Personalized Zero Carbs Challenge helped me make better choices without feeling overwhelmed. The meals were easy, and the support made the process feel more manageable. Now I feel lighter, more active, and more in control of my habits. I only wish I had started sooner.
paywall.purchaseLegal: By clicking Start my plan, you agree to pay __INTRO__ for the __PLAN__ intro plan. If you do not cancel before it ends, you will be charged __RENEWAL__ every __PERIOD__ until you cancel. You can cancel anytime online from your account.
paywall.featureIntro: The Personalized Zero Carbs Challenge was created to help you feel more in control around food, cravings, and daily choices.
